---
title: Normalization of sums
date: 05-15-2026
author:
  - name: Vikraman Choudhury
filters:
  - imagify
imagify:
  header-includes: |
    \usepackage{quiver}
---

::: {.hidden}
$$
\newcommand{abs}[1]{\left|#1\right|}
\newcommand{\covers}{\mathrel{\triangleleft}}
$$
:::

::: {#def-posite}
A posite $(P, \leq, \covers)$ is a poset $(P, \leq)$ with a binary relation ${\covers} \subseteq P \times 2^{\abs{P}}$ such that:

- if $u \covers V$ and $v \in V$, then $v \leq u$;

- if $u \covers V$ and $u' \leq u$, then there exists $V'$ such that $u' \covers V'$, and for all $v' \in V'$, there exists $v \in V$ such that $v' \leq v$.

:::
